description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines a single build stage. Add a build job that runs before_script steps: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY and export CONTAINER_TAG="${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}}". In the script step, run docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:$CONTAINER_TAG . followed by docker push $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:$CONTAINER_TAG. The job has no additional caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
